reason: WP01 ready: two-axis sql-column schema (composite PK via surrogate vid + UNIQUE (entity_id, langcode, vid)); FR-001/002/004/005/006/008 covered by 21 new tests; M-006 single-axis tests pass unchanged (8 tests). Commit 7d46f164c.

review.reference: WP02 review passed: 5 files +974 LOC, 25 new tests, 610 entity-storage tests green, cs-check/phpstan/check-package-layers all clean. TranslationSchemaHandler::syncTwoAxis delegates to RevisionTableBuilder::buildTwoAxis (WP01). DBAL 4.x query() workaround documented inline (avoids lastInsertId path for pre-allocated vid). MAX(vid)+1 uses COALESCE; single-writer race contract deferred to WP03 transaction wrap (documented). M-006 single-axis suites (SqlBlobTranslatable*, TranslationStorageTest) included in 610 green. Scope clean (entity-storage src+tests only).

WP03 ready: SaveContext withTranslations + atomic two-axis save semantics; 36 new tests pass; all gates green; commit d25c48f64

review.reference: WP03 review passed: SaveContext::withTranslations builder is immutable (new self per call), validates non-empty list + non-empty strings, preserves langcode (precedence per contract). RevisionableStorageDriver::writeRevision adds optional ?string $langcode = null — backward-compatible signature; single-axis path extracted to writeDefaultRevision byte-equivalent. Two-axis path (writePerLangcodeRevision) only fires when langcode!==null AND isTwoAxis(). New Waaseyaa\EntityStorage\Revision\RevisionPruningPolicy coexists with M-006 Waaseyaa\EntityStorage\RevisionPruningPolicy (sibling preserved). Atomic multi-language save with PartialSaveException covered by Phase29 integration test (3 tests, 14 assertions). Verified: 12+5+14+3=34 new tests green, 641/641 entity-storage suite green (1717 assertions), cs-check clean, phpstan clean (level 5), bin/check-package-layers OK. Scope respected: only entity-storage src + tests + Phase29 integration test.

review.reference: WP05 approved: RevisionPolicyComposition stateless helper correctly routes view_revision/translate through translation instance (FR-020), with Neutral->view (FR-021) and Neutral->edit (FR-022) fallback; Forbidden/Unauthenticated/Allowed short-circuit as required. AccessPolicyInterface deferral to WP08 honored per contract §7. Gates: phpstan OK, cs-check OK, layers OK; access tests 225 pass; policy unit tests 14 pass (8+6); Phase29 integration 7 pass. Intelephense flags are false positives (PHP 8.5 #[\NoDiscard] + typed class const string).
